Highlights of the Week
The cyclical behavio r of prices has been in motion this week and the
jhhnhu
subcontinent recycling market is slightly descending weighed down by the
sliding Iron ore prices. Bangladesh and Pakistan have witnessed
considerable fall in offer prices whereas end buyers from India have
ma intained stable offer prices. In terms of wider Macroeconomic outlook, the
steel demand is stable throughout the globe, but currently the market
sentiments seem to be reacting in panic mode due to the steep fall in iron
ore prices.
